title: Represent a structured log event
scenario: Structured logging starts with events that have names and levels instead of ad-hoc strings.
instructions: Define LogLevel and LogEvent with event_name and level fields.

hints.body: Keep the Structured request logging code active and define LogLevel and LogEvent with event_name and level fields.
Use the Rust API named in this lesson instead of adding a side helper; the previous arc code should stay in the main solution.
One complete solution for Represent a structured log event is shown below.

completionExplanation: Represent a structured log event now extends the active Structured request logging code with log event struct. The previous lesson's behavior remains in the main solution rather than an archived module.
